Our Story

Beauty crafted with
heart & skill

At Lindz Beauty Salon, beauty is more than a service — it's a personal experience. Our self-taught stylist has spent years mastering hair and makeup, developing a sharp eye for what makes each client shine.

From everyday styles to bridal transformations, we bring dedication and creativity to every appointment. Walk in, relax, and walk out looking and feeling your absolute best.

Expert braiding, weaves & natural hair care
Soft, Full & Bridal glam makeup
Personalised service — every client is unique
Empire Building, 2nd Floor, Mbabane CBD

Good to Know

Booking &
cancellation
policy

Cancellation Policy

We kindly ask that all cancellations be made at least 24 hours before your scheduled appointment.


Cancellations made within 24 hours will incur a late cancellation fee of:

E100

This fee is deducted from your deposit. We appreciate your understanding as this helps us serve all clients fairly.
